title: Xtra Smoky Filipino Naan Bread Menudo
description: A fresh and crumbly vegan Filipino dish featuring naan bread and a smoky menudo, perfect for a romantic evening
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Slice the naan bread into small pieces and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the canned tomatoes and vegetarian menudo mix, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and let cook for 10 minutes.
Add the sliced naan bread to the skillet and stir to combine with the menudo mixture.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 10 minutes.
